violations.text: The dishwasher was observed in poor repair (surface temperature of thermometer reading 135 degrees Fahrenheit). New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The floors in the room next to the back door/loading area was observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in the walk-in refrigerator near the pizza prep area has an accumulation of black debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The hand sink in the front deli area and the ware-washing area was observed with low water pressure. Inadequate water pressure could lead to situations that place the public health at risk. Inadequate pressure could result in improper handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by inconsistent temperatures taken from the high temperature thermometer (ranging from 145-211 degrees Fahrenheit) and the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. All dishes and utensils to be washed in the dishwasher ONLY and sanitized in the 3-bay sink until it can be serviced/replaced/repaired. Person in charge to send proof of service to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan covers in both walk-in refrigerators have an accumulation of black debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
The paint on the ceiling in the ware-washing area was observed to be chipping. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023
The paint on the ceiling in the ware-washing area was observed to be chipping. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023

The floors in the generator room, ware-washing room and inside the bottom drawer of the deli handwashing sink have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by the accumulation of rodent droppings throughout the kitchen and front service area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must clean and sanitize the physical facilities/any affected areas daily to monitor and aid in the pest control of rodents. Establishment currently has monthly pest control services that are recommended to increase bi-weekly until rodent activity is resolved. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

A dead mouse was observed under equipment in the main service line. Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents, and other pests shall be removed from control devices and the PREMISES at a frequency that prevents their accumulation, decomposition, or the attraction of pests. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The hand sink in the front deli area and the ware-washing area was observed with low water pressure. Inadequate water pressure could lead to situations that place the public health at risk. Inadequate pressure could result in improper handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
The paint on the ceiling in the ware-washing area was observed to be chipping. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment to sanitize equipment in 3 bay sink until dishwasher is repaired.PIC to provide inspector with proof of repairs. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023
Handwashing sink located in the warewashing area was not in good repair(low hot water pressure). New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2023
The ceiling in the warewashing area is in poor repair (chipped paint). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023
